input.newString:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en" class="dark">
  <head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8" />
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0" />
    <title>Relay Swap</title>
    <meta name="description" content="Swap any token across 85+ chains instantly" />
    <meta name="author" content="VIE" />

    <meta property="og:title" content="Relay Swap" />
    <meta property="og:description" content="Swap any token across 85+ chains instantly" />
    <meta property="og:type" content="website" />

    <meta name="twitter:card" content="summary_large_image" />
    <meta name="twitter:site" content="@vie_xyz" />

    <meta name="fc:miniapp" content='{
      "version": "1",
      "imageUrl": "__IMAGE_URL__",
      "button": {
        "title": "Swap Tokens",
        "action": {
          "type": "launch_miniapp",
          "name": "Relay Swap",
          "url": "__HOME_URL__"
        }
      }
    }' />
  </head>
